name: Vertoz Advertising Limited
summary: Vertoz Advertising Limited provides media buying and programmatic advertising solutions worldwide. Its Ingenious Plex media buying platform offers real-time trading of digital advertising between advertisers and publishers. The company was formerly known as Vertoz Media Limited and changed its name to Vertoz Advertising Limited in June 2017. Vertoz Advertising Limited was founded in 2012 and is based in Mumbai, India.
